_description: De Novo CDR Design pipeline settings — controls which stages run and their parameters. Derived from VGRW-SR-R2 HER2 VHH case analysis (April 2026). See DE_NOVO_CDR_DESIGN_STANDARD.md §4 for full rationale.

mpnn._comment: ProteinMPNN sampling. Higher temperatures increase diversity at the cost of structure confidence.
mpnn._note_temperatures: Removed T=0.2 (too conservative, produces 82% redundancy). Added T=0.8 and T=1.0 for high-entropy diversity.
mpnn._note_samples: Reduced from 200 to 150 per temperature. More unique diversity per sample due to higher T.

bias_AA_ptm_avoidance._comment: Global amino-acid bias to reduce PTM-prone outputs. Applied via --bias_AA_per_residue JSON. Negative = penalize. Keys are 1-letter AA codes.
bias_AA_ptm_avoidance._reference: See helpers/mpnn_bias.py for per-position bias JSON generation.
bias_AA_ptm_avoidance._rationale: In the VGRW-SR-R2 case, 397/400 sequences had Y57->D/N + P58->A creating DA/NA PTM motifs. Penalizing D and N at tip positions prevents this systematic failure mode.

t00_dedup_ptm._comment: T0.0: Immediate dedup + PTM/chemical liability check. Always first. Runs in <1s. No model required.
t00_dedup_ptm._lesson: In VGRW-SR-R2: 73% of sequences failed PTM check. Running this FIRST would have saved all downstream compute on bad sequences.

t0_oasis._comment: T0: OASis 9-mer human coverage. Sequence must remain 'human-like'. CDR identity filter prevents trivial variants.
t0_oasis._note: cdr_identity_max: sequences with >70% CDR identity to WT are considered insufficiently diverse for patent escape.

t1_ablang._lesson: In VGRW-SR-R2 CDR2-only design: T1 passed 118/118 (100%). Score range was only -0.41 to -0.32. Zero filtering power for single-CDR CDR2-only designs. Waste: ~10 min.
t1_ablang._when_useful: Multi-CDR or CDR3 designs where naturalness can genuinely degrade.

t05_cluster._comment: T0.5: Hamming clustering to reduce redundancy among survivors.
t05_cluster._note: hamming_dist=2 avoids over-clustering near-identical sequences from same MPNN run.

t2_immunebuilder._comment: T2: ImmuneBuilder structural QC. Expensive (~3 min/seq). Only run when structural disruption is plausible.
t2_immunebuilder._lesson: In VGRW-SR-R2 CDR2-only (5-7 mutations, framework fixed): 27/27 pass, max RMSD only 1.36 Å (54% of limit). Waste: ~81 min. Rule: skip when single non-CDR3 CDR with ≤10 mutable positions.
t2_immunebuilder._rmsd_prediction: When MPNN naturally fixes ≥60% of CDR positions and framework is locked, global RMSD will always be <1.5 Å.

t3_complex._comment: T3: Complex-level binding geometry and specificity check.

tools._note: Use rigid superposition of predicted monomer back onto reference complex for epitope clash/overlap check. No full docking needed.

binding_energy._lesson: PRODIGY is insufficiently accurate for ranking purposes. MM/GBSA (500 steps OpenMM) is used in the 15-parameter final evaluation.

decision_logic._comment: Logic to determine need_structure_prediction() and gate skip conditions.

need_structure_prediction_rules.reason: Framework changes can propagate to fold
CDR3 is conformationally variable; MPNN cannot fully constrain loop geometry
Multi-CDR interactions may cause cooperative misfolding
Extensive mutations (>10 positions) can destabilize packing
High-entropy sampling may produce structurally unusual sequences
Single non-CDR3 CDR, ≤10 positions, framework fixed → RMSD always <1.5 Å

need_ablang_rules.condition: CDR3 in redesign_cdrs OR len(redesign_cdrs) >= 2 OR framework_changed

need_ablang_rules.reason: Single CDR2 redesign: score variance too narrow for useful discrimination

ranking._comment: Multi-objective scoring weights. Source: denovo_ranking_weights.json (project-level). Pipeline-level defaults here.

final_evaluation._comment: 15-parameter evaluation via AffinityEnergyToolkit. Always run on top_k candidates + WT.

key_findings: T0.0 PTM gate: 73% kill rate in <1s. Should always be first.
T1 AbLang: 0% kill rate for single CDR2 design. Skip unless multi-CDR.
T2 ImmuneBuilder: 0% kill rate for CDR2-only, 5-7 mutations. Skip for this scope. Saves ~81 min.
T3 PRODIGY: replaced by MM/GBSA for accuracy.
MPNN T=0.2-0.5 produces 82% redundancy. Use T=0.3-1.0 for better diversity.
Root positions: MPNN naturally fixes structural anchors. No need to hardcode in mask.
PTM at positions 51+52 (Y57->D/N, P58->A) caused 397/400 sequences to fail QC. bias_AA penalty prevents this.
